_description: Edge Rover Reach + dies trigger. Bob is the active player and attacks with Snapping Drake (3/2 flying). Alice's Edge Rover (2/2 reach) blocks the Drake — testing that Reach lets a non-flier block a flier. Combat damage: 3 from Drake kills Edge Rover; 2 from Edge Rover kills the Drake. When Edge Rover dies, its trigger fires and each player creates a Lander token. Verify (1) Edge Rover legally blocks the flying Drake, (2) both die in combat damage, (3) one Lander appears on Alice's battlefield AND one on Bob's battlefield.
